summary: Recent updates to Firefox have focused on enhancing the capabilities of media playback and improving the code that supports it. Key changes include upgrades to the **Picture-In-Picture (PiP) API**, which allows videos to be played in a small, floating window while users browse other content, making it easier to multitask. Additionally, improvements to the **MediaDecoder** system streamline how audio and video are processed, ensuring that resources are managed more efficiently. This streamlining will ultimately result in a smoother playback experience for users, as the browser can now handle media interactions more effectively. Overall, these enhancements represent a commitment to delivering better media functionalities and user experience within the Firefox browser.
